classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V7.0.0 after the lifecycle-traceability through outcome review slice passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V7.0.0 is the stable release for lifecycle-traceability through outcome review slice.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted Lifecycle-traceability through outcome review slice in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep private self-hosting work outside PM product workspaces and promote only reusable repo surfaces.
